valueAnnotation.text: Present this digital card when receiving care or filling prescriptions. Coverage and cost sharing may depend on network, benefit rules, and plan status.

valueReference.display: Summary of Benefits and Coverage - Aetna PPO Value Plan

extension.valueString: Image of the front of the member's physical insurance card showing plan name, member ID, and group number
Image of the back of the member's physical insurance card showing claims address, customer service numbers, and pharmacy information

benefit.requirement: Referral may be required for some services

item.text: A quick check-in about how your migraines have been since your last visit. Your answers help your care team focus on what has changed, what is working, and what matters most today.
In the past 90 days, about how many days had migraine symptoms?
In the past 90 days, about how many days were moderate or severe?
In the past 30 days, on how many days did you take acute headache medicine?
Medication-use pattern may be worth reviewing when acute medicines are used on 10 or more days per month.
Compared with your last visit, how are your migraines overall?

answer.valueString: Fewer missed workdays and an acute plan that reliably works within two hours.

item.text: What is the main thing you want your migraine clinician to know or address today?
